title: TE Connectivity (TEL) Q3 Earnings & Sales Beat, Rise Y/Y
text: TE Connectivity's (TEL) results for the fiscal third quarter reflect benefits from solid momentum across communications and industrial solutions.

title: TE Connectivity (TEL) Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: TE Connectivity (TEL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 6.29% and 5.15%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: What's in the Cards for TE Connectivity's (TEL) Q3 Earnings?
text: TE Connectivity's (TEL) fiscal third-quarter results are expected to reflect the solid momentum across the industrial and communication segments amid the pandemic.
